claim_limits: Completion requires a validated Hermes Gestalt Runtime Pack.
Full runtime completion requires a real Hermes runtime proof, not only simulated proof.
This audit does not authorize production deploy, public send, spend, provider mutation, or secrets access.

requirements.requirement: Dedicated Hermes Gestalt Runtime Pack exists and validates

requirements.detail: simulated Hermes method proof only; no production or live provider claim
requirements.requirement: Simulated Hermes run proves idea to kernel to contract to handoff shape
Company package validates with Hermes as default runtime

requirements.detail: Runtime setup check passed without writing secrets.
requirements.requirement: WEAVE can compile a public-safe local Hermes runtime profile

requirements.detail: Local runtime profile proves a pinned Hermes source checkout and executable are present.
requirements.requirement: A real Hermes executable is present in the local runtime profile

requirements.detail: Secret scan, topology scan, and Hermes Gestalt pack proof validation passed.
requirements.requirement: Public safety and method proof verifiers pass
